specs.name: Storage Models
specs.topic: The API represents ideas, runs, and progress as structured storage models for internal state management

specs.name: Managing Run State
specs.topic: The API maintains a single in-memory state-of-the-world object tracking run lifecycle, ideas, and allowed actions

specs.name: Translating Portal and Optimizer Messages
specs.topic: The API translates portal user actions into optimizer commands and optimizer events into portal updates

specs.name: Writing Workspace Output
specs.topic: The API writes reviewed ideas, run metadata, and state snapshots to disk on run completion

specs.name: Regeneration Orchestration
specs.topic: The API orchestrates idea regeneration by separating rejection from replacement, maintaining lineage, and handling per-idea failures
